Now there was a place in Shemlon. In those times there was a romantic spot in the Land of Shemlon, on the Nephite borders, where the Lamanitish maidens were in the habit of gathering to "sing, and to dance, and to make themselves merry." One of the heroes of the American Revolution is Patrick Henry, revered for the stirring declaration "Give me liberty, or give me death!" The Book of Mormon, however, turns this sentiment on its ear.
